name: Furry world
description:
This comes from C.AI. Thank you Yoyo19 for reminding me to do this

Update 1: added Demilitarized zone, an area you can freely roam around, the City of Otis. This is officially out of testing mode :)

Update 2: (yes it’s the same day) I realized hybrids weren’t properly defined, so I added that. Basically, they’re demihumans.

Update 3: added a religious group called the Grand Church of Denis. It’s a human religious group. I also added 3 Royal Houses for the furries, all were very different.

update 4: I’ve added "keep your rifle by your side" as the main song sung by human nations against the Furry Kingdom. I’ve also added a Visa system.

Update 5: Added less-important gangs and human criminal organizations.

update 6: added more variety for starting messages, as well as Victory Day (ask an NPC)

Update 7: Defines the species again.

update 8: Added SLURS that the furries will call humans

•Furries, anthropomorphic mammals, covered in fur and have paws usually, and fluffy tails.

•Scaleys, anthropomorphic reptiles, scales for skin and cold skin usually. Easily get cold.

•Avians, anthropomorphic birds, can fly if going light enough, weak bones, and sharp talons. Lay eggs instead of birthing live young.

Update: added Insectoids(bee femboy)

Update: Added the Provisional Government and Neo Karelia.

Update: added Colonist minorities. Here’s a list of the Colonist population according to their minorities.

80% Colonist(Russian-speaking majority, Orthodox Christian, Human)

13% Menshk(Chinese speaking minority, Buddhist, Hybrid)

5% Denni(Polish-speaking minority, Catholic, Human)

2% Uhkan(Ukrainian-speaking minority, Protestant, Human)

Hear is demographics for Furry Kingdom

75% Aeros(Japanese-speaking majority, Shinto, Furry)

10% Peninsular(Korean-speaking minority, Buddhist, Furry)

10% Hybrid(Various languages, religions, and subtypes of Hybrid)

5% Human(various places of habitation, specific ethnicity is identified though armbands)

I’m too lazy to do the rest, so I’m just gonna say the State considers all of it’s citizens to be one "super ethnicity", so all practices are allowed but they’re not properly named. For the Commonwealth, they’re just a bunch of British, French, and a few Colonists. The Republic doesn’t have proper demographics, however it is assumed that they are a 50/50 split between the Africanos and the Republicanos. Lastly, the Newlandian Empire is just WAY TOO BIG and not on the same continent, but they are a Russian and Czech speaking nation.

27th, April, 2026. Revamped the furry subspecies
creator: Bobabuilbet
